description: Golden E2E questions for testing the full pipeline against seeded Postgres

questions.query: What is the total revenue by region for Q1 2024?
questions.notes: Should join orders with regions, filter Q1 2024 completed orders

questions.query: Who are the top 5 customers by lifetime value?
questions.notes: Simple single-table query with ordering and limit

questions.query: What are the best-selling products by total quantity sold?
questions.notes: Requires joining order_items with products, aggregating quantity

questions.query: How many orders were placed per sales channel in 2024?
questions.notes: Single table with GROUP BY on channel, date filter

questions.query: What is the average order value by customer segment?
questions.notes: Requires joining orders with customers for segment, then AVG
